payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Dark brown leather two-seat loveseat with shiny, worn upholstery and deep creasing on the seat and back cushions, padded rolled arms and horizontal stitched cushion segments; the right side is slightly edge-cropped in the image and the couch appears about 1.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather loveseat, front","long_description":"Dark brown leather two-seat loveseat with shiny, worn upholstery and deep creasing on the seat and back cushions, padded rolled arms and horizontal stitched cushion segments; the right side is slightly edge-cropped in the image and the couch appears about 1.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown leather","two-seat/loveseat","shiny worn finish","deep creases/wrinkles","segmented/stiched cushions","padded rolled arms","recliner-style seams","right-side partially cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
